canonical_answer: At 6 seconds, a dark grey vacuum head appears on the beige carpet; at 8 seconds, the vacuum cleaner disappears from the frame; at 14 seconds, the silver wand and black handle reappear diagonally; at 16 seconds, the vacuum cleaner disappears again; finally at 18 seconds, the attachment returns on the floor.
